### DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE

### COMMUNICATION PREFERENCE
- The user may ask question that is vague and you are required to ask user back
- Question written in `./INQUIRY.md` are preffered

### Primary objective
- Project based learning
- Redesign the system from scratch and build it up in same tech stack (Vite + Express)
- Not destroy the code base, please becareful of permission setting. in `~/.claude/setting.json` and in `./claude/setting.json`

### CONTEXT MANAGEMENT
- READ `./CONTEXT.md` to be reminded of the project overview.
- BUFFER.md is for you to store short term memory of two #H1 section representing two topics instance
    - May use if you see context of a question is too large or complex (e.g. discussing the whole repo architecture , read multiple documentations)
    - Any planning draft you hold can be stored here
    - Notify me if you want to overwrite `./BUFFER.md` , except in automode

### Remark
- This was in experimental branch called "just-playin"

## graphify
This project has a knowledge graph at graphify-out/ with god nodes, community structure, and cross-file relationships.

Rules:
- For codebase questions, first run `graphify query "<question>"` when graphify-out/graph.json exists. Use `graphify path "<A>" "<B>"` for relationships and `graphify explain "<concept>"` for focused concepts. These return a scoped subgraph, usually much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md or raw grep output.
- If graphify-out/wiki/index.md exists, use it for broad navigation instead of raw source browsing.
- Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture review or when query/path/explain do not surface enough context.
- After modifying code, run `graphify update .` to keep the graph current (AST-only, no API cost).
